title: Simple Cobblestone Generator
description: All the cobblestone you'll ever need!
body:
A simple cobblestone generator to fullfill all of your cobblestone needs!


With 5 tiers, ranging from Basic to Extreme, these generators can be accessed early in the game and can be upgraded as you progress, with great boosts in generation.


This mod is recommended for skyblock modpacks.

![The 5 tiers of Cobblestone Generators](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/407/90/2021-11-09_13.png)

## Discord
You can discuss, suggest new features and get previews of my mods on my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/G8s2q4wMnt)!
